---
title: "Engineered Nanoparticles Enhance Photodynamic Inactivation Against the WHO Fungal Priority Pathogens. A Systematic Review"
date: 2025-09-01
author:
  - name: Da Silva, Abdênego R.
  - name: Raposo, Bruno L.
  - name: De Lima, Geyse S.
  - name: Bueno-Janice, Jacqueline C.
  - name: Sellera, Fábio P.
  - name: Cabral Filho, Paulo E.
  - name: Fontes, Adriana
  - name: Ribeiro, Martha S.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "BioNanoScience"
  volume: 15
  issue: 3
  doi: "10.1007/s12668-025-01932-4"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Engineered Nanoparticles Enhance Photodynamic Inactivation Against the WHO Fungal Priority Pathogens. A Systematic Review</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
